discovery.title: Browse your catalogs
discovery.subtitle: Titles from your installed add-ons.
discovery.noProvidersDescription: Install an add-on to search and browse movies and series.
discovery.noBrowseableCatalogsTitle: Add a catalog to browse titles
discovery.noBrowseableCatalogsDescription: Your installed add-ons provide viewing options, but none provides a movie or series catalog. Add Cinemeta or another catalog add-on to browse titles.
discovery.noCatalogsDescription: Your installed add-ons do not offer catalogs for the selected title type.
discovery.catalogErrorDescription: This catalog could not be loaded. Try again.

command.label: Quick search
command.minimum: Type at least 2 characters to search
command.errorDescription: Check your connection and try again.

results.preparingFilters: Loading all matches before applying filters… {{count}} titles loaded.
results.detailHint: Choose a title to view details and available playback options.

states.partial: Some sources could not be reached. Showing results from the sources that responded.
states.partialCompact: Some sources could not be searched.
states.truncated: Showing a bounded set of matches. Refine your search to see more specific results.
states.truncatedCompact: Showing a limited set of matches. Refine your search for more.
states.noSearchProviderDescription: Your installed add-ons do not provide title search. Install a searchable catalog add-on to find movies and series.
states.errorDescription: Check your connection and try the search again.
states.providersFailedDescription: None of your content sources responded. Try again in a moment.
states.noMatchDescription: Nothing matched “{{query}}”. Try a different title.
states.filterEmptyDescription: Reset your filters to see all matching titles.
states.filterLimitTitle: Refine this search to use these filters
states.filterLimitDescription: There are too many matches to load safely for complete filtering. Try a more specific title or reset the filters.

empty.retryDescription: Refresh your catalogs or check your connection.

auth.subtitle: Sign in to access your watchlist

header.description: Saved films, series, and everything ready to continue.

empty.title: No Items Yet
empty.description: Browse the Discover tab and add movies & shows to your library.

alerts.bulkDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to remove {{count}} items? This cannot be undone.

alerts.bulkRemoveFailed: Could not remove the selected titles.

actions.prompt: What would you like to do?

history.emptyDescription: Titles you watch will appear here, including completed ones.
history.clearMessage: This permanently removes all watched titles and progress from your history. Your Library and downloads stay untouched.
history.removeFailed: Could not remove this history entry.

header.subtitle: Your queue and verified offline files on this device

alerts.clearMessage: Are you sure? This will delete all downloaded files from your device.
alerts.clearAllMessage: This removes every managed download and its local file from this device.

alerts.bulkDeleteMessage: Delete {{count}} downloads from this device? You can undo for a few seconds.

sections.readySubtitle: Verified files available on this device

storage.externalCleanup: Streamer can only remove downloads managed by this app. Use your device storage settings for other files.

smart.title: Smart Downloads

smart.enableSubtitle: Opt in before Streamer plans any automatic episode downloads.
smart.nextEpisodeSubtitle: Plans the next unwatched episode when a series download finishes.
smart.autoDeleteSubtitle: Cleanup is opt-in and never removes unverified files.
smart.wifiOnlySubtitle: Mobile background downloads are platform-limited; this preference gates automatic plans.
smart.manageSubtitle: Next episode, Wi‑Fi, quality, and cleanup preferences

recovery.pausedMessage: Resume when you are ready to continue this download.
recovery.noManagedFileMessage: The managed file is no longer available on this device.
recovery.missingFileMessage: The downloaded file could not be found. Prepare it again.
recovery.verificationMessage: Check the local file before marking it ready offline.
recovery.interruptedMessage: The transfer stopped before it finished. You can safely resume it.
recovery.storageMessage: Free some device storage before retrying this download.
recovery.setupMessage: Open Sources & Devices and review this device before retrying the download.
recovery.expiredMessage: This viewing option is no longer available. Prepare the download again.
recovery.unsupportedMessage: This viewing option cannot be saved for offline use.
recovery.invalidMediaMessage: This file is incomplete or cannot be played. Download it again.
recovery.failedMessage: Try the download again or choose another viewing option.

footer.verified: Offline items are shown as ready only after the local file is verified.

empty.title: No Downloads

intro.streamingDescription: Films, series, and your next episode in one quiet, cinematic library.
intro.syncTitle: Pick up where you left off

intro.playbackDescription: Choose your viewing options once. Streamer keeps the details out of the way.

setupCheck.offlineCastBody: Downloads and casting appear automatically when they are available.

playbackPreferences.qualityDescription: Streamer only uses the selected video qualities. SD and sources without a known quality stay excluded. Keep at least one selected.
playbackPreferences.audioDescription: Prefer this audio track when it is available.
playbackPreferences.subtitlesDescription: Choose the subtitle language selected at the start of playback.
playbackPreferences.autoplayDescription: Continue a series when the next episode is known.

downloadPreferences.smartDownloadsDescription: Automatically manage selected episodes using your preferences.
downloadPreferences.nextEpisodeDescription: Plan the next unwatched episode when a series download finishes.
downloadPreferences.wifiOnlyDescription: Only create automatic download plans on Wi-Fi.
downloadPreferences.cleanupDescription: Remove verified watched files when space can be reclaimed.
downloadPreferences.qualityDescription: Set the maximum quality for automatic downloads.
downloadPreferences.storageLimitDescription: Choose how much space Smart Downloads may use on this device.

update.notLoaded: Update status has not loaded yet.
update.unsupported: Update checks are available in packaged desktop builds.
update.downloaded: An update was downloaded by the desktop updater.

sourcesSection.addonsDescription: Install and manage the add-ons that provide your catalog.
sourcesSection.pageDescription: Review playback availability, connected devices, and content sources.
sourcesSection.playbackDevicesDescription: See whether this device can prepare local playback and casting.

sourcesSection.castingLimited: Casting is available for compatible sources and devices.

advancedSection.lanWarningTitle: Use the desktop app's network address

advancedSection.devicesDescription: Use the desktop app for playback services on this network.
advancedSection.castingReadyDescription: Casting can use the active playback plan.
advancedSection.playbackDescription: Detailed source information is shown here only for troubleshooting.
advancedSection.directStreamsDescription: Supported HTTP and HLS sources play without the desktop service.
advancedSection.torrentStreamsDescription: Torrent sources use the desktop service for preparation and playback.
advancedSection.downloadsDescription: Offline availability appears after a local file is verified.
advancedSection.resolversDescription: Optional paid services are not required for setup.
advancedSection.realDebridDescription: Optional paid resolver. Disabled by default and not needed for first-time setup.
advancedSection.technicalDescription: Connection settings and diagnostics for troubleshooting.
advancedSection.connectionDescription: Server addresses and the pairing token for the desktop service.
advancedSection.pairingPlaceholder: Only needed when the desktop service requires a token
advancedSection.diagnosticsDescription: Build, runtime, media engine, cache, and repair details.
advancedSection.setupReadyDescription: Direct and supported torrent playback, downloads, and casting can use this setup.
advancedSection.setupRepairDescription: Direct playback can still work, but service-backed playback and downloads need repair first.
advancedSection.diagnosticsCopiedDescription: A safe debug bundle was copied to the clipboard.
advancedSection.diagnosticsExportedDescription: A safe debug bundle was exported.
advancedSection.cacheCleanupResult: Removed {{count}} inactive cache entries and freed {{size}}.
advancedSection.cacheCleanupFailedDescription: Could not clean inactive cache entries.
advancedSection.serviceMaintenanceDescription: Re-check, repair, clean cached files or export diagnostics.
advancedSection.restartDescription: Restart the local desktop playback process.
advancedSection.hideTechnical: Hide internal status and version details.
advancedSection.showTechnical: Show internal status and version details.

errors.torrentBridge: This is a torrent stream. Start the stream-server bridge first.

notifications.markAllReadError: Couldn't mark all notifications as read.

biometricLock.title: Streamer is locked
biometricLock.subtitle: Confirm your identity to return to your library.

privacy.1: Streamer stores the account and playback data needed to provide your library, progress, and device sessions.
privacy.2: Authentication tokens and connection credentials are treated as sensitive and are not included in diagnostic exports.
privacy.3: Installed add-ons and external services have their own privacy practices. Review them before connecting an account or source.
privacy.4: You can export your data or delete your account from Privacy settings.

terms.1: By using Streamer, you agree to these terms and the laws that apply where you live.
terms.2: Use Streamer and connected sources responsibly. You are responsible for the sources and content you choose to access.
terms.3: You retain responsibility for links, add-ons, and other configuration you add to the service.
terms.4: Streamer is provided without a guarantee that every external source or device will remain available.
